All prices are the current market price.

Booster Box (Pokemon Base Set | Pokemon Cards) prices are based on the historic sales. The prices shown are calculated using our proprietary algorithm.
Historic sales data are completed sales with a buyer and a seller agreeing on a price. We do not factor unsold items into our prices.
Chart shows the price of Booster Box at the end of each month going back as long as we have tracked the item.
